race.comment: SAVVY RULER (9) missed in a photo on resumption before a 1.4L defeat most recently when jumping the race favourite on the main track here. That form has worked out well with two starters since both being winners. Blinkers go on now, Pike sticks and she can make her presence felt. YALDA NIGHT (2) was strong over this trip two back before a down effort as the equal fave at York most recently. Nottle hops back on board today and dropping back in distance looks a good move. Can launch a strong attack. BARRAQUITO (12) can improve getting straight out to this trip second-up. MISS SANTA CORRS (8) is on the cusp of a win, beating SAVVY RULER last time out. Can feature in the finish.
